headline: Clip Launches Mi Clip, a Digital Wallet Ecosystem, by Partnering with Ant International, Mastercard and Televisa-Univision
summary: MEXICO CITY, June 11, 2026--Clip, Mexico’s premier financial ecosystem, announced today the launching of Mi Clip, a digital wallet ecosystem designed to accelerate the adoption of digital payments, drive acceptance across merchants and consumers nationwide, and expand access to formal financial services for millions of Mexicans. Mi Clip is supported by commercial and technological solutions from Clip’s payment platform, Ant International’s AI technology, Mastercard’s trusted global payments netw
